scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit && vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
scripts.test:batch3: npx vitest run src/hooks/__tests__ src/server/__tests__ src/__tests__
scripts.test:batch5: npx vitest run src/components/PartyTab/__tests__ src/components/EncountersTab/__tests__ src/components/NpcLibraryTab/__tests__
scripts.test:full: npx vitest run src/lib/__tests__ && npx vitest run src/services/__tests__ && npx vitest run src/hooks/__tests__ src/server/__tests__ src/__tests__ && npx vitest run src/components/ActiveEncounterTab/__tests__ && npx vitest run src/components/PartyTab/__tests__ src/components/EncountersTab/__tests__ src/components/NpcLibraryTab/__tests__ && npx vitest run src/components/__tests__ src/components/ui/__tests__
